exact.verifyMatches: UniversalSettle destination for the signed transfer

sla-escrow.fundPaymentSeller: extra.merchantWallet or extra.beneficiary (seller payout wallet; not payTo)
sla-escrow.verifyMatches: payTo equals derive_escrow_pda(mint, bank) for payment asset

onboardNote: GET /api/v1/facilitator/sellers/{wallet}/preview returns per-scheme previews. For sla-escrow, preview vaultPda is for preview mint only; use GET /api/v1/facilitator/sellers/{wallet}/rails/sla-escrow?asset=<mint> for each accepts[].asset.

paymentMintAllowlist.upgradeWarning: POST /api/v1/facilitator/payment-required/enrich logs when accepts[].asset is not allowlisted (non-blocking)
